Modes of Engagement

Calls
Sit-Ins
PexPanel
Knowledge Tours
Calls

Telephonic consultations with subject matter experts thoroughly vetted on a pre decided agenda are one of the cheapest and fastest of getting insightful information on any topic. Given the size and comprehensive nature of our panel, you can get an answer to any query. You can also fix up face-to-face meetings for detailed discussions.

Sit-Ins

Sit-ins are private conferences, masterclass or rigorous workshops on a topic of your choice, by an expert of your choice at a time and location of your choice

PexPanel

PexPanel is the purest manifestation of the on-demand economy. You can utilise the services of best in the industry when you need them, the way you need them without committing to full-time hiring.

Why PexPanel?

PexPanel complements your in-house resources and helps you utilise the services of ex-CXOs and top professionals who have "been there done that" without hiring them full-time.

Engagement Model?

  • Subscriptions: You can buy a fixed number of hours of one or multiple experts
  • Statement of work employees
  • Short-term Projects

Pricing Model?

Pay only for what you use. In case of subscriptions, we take care of the payments to experts. In case of SOW-employees or short term projects, we act as a headhunting firm with efficient pricing

KnowledgeTours

Infollion Knowledge Tours (IKTs) are private research trips with a dash of leisure designed specifically for fund managers, investors or top management executives by our researchers and hospitality experts in tandem to help you gauge the pulse of business and consumer sentiments.
